page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Seqscreen was created to sensitively assign taxonomic classifications, functional annotations, and biological processes of interest to single, short dna sequences (50bp-1,000bp).
page_metadata.biotools__summary: SeqScreen sensitively assigns taxonomic classifications, functional annotations, and biological processes of interest to short DNA sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SeqScreen sensitively assigns taxonomic classifications, functional annotations, and biological processes of interest to short DNA sequences.
